personal_info.name: Tirth
personal_info.title: Software Engineer & Developer
personal_info.summary: I am a passionate software engineer focused on building intelligent web applications, AI integrations, and scalable architectures. I love solving complex problems and turning ideas into impactful digital experiences.

work_experience.description: Developed high-performance web applications using React and Node.js. Integrated AI features that boosted user engagement by 40%.

projects.title: AI-Powered Portfolio
projects.short_description: A smart portfolio website featuring an embedded LLM chatbot.
projects.motivation: I wanted a portfolio that didn't just passively list my top projects, but could actively talk to recruiters and answer their specific questions about my background using advanced AI.
achievements: Implemented a custom RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline using pure JSON datastores, bypassing complex Vector DB limitations.
Created an automatic multi-LLM fallback architecture, ensuring 99.9% uptime (falling back from OpenAI to Claude and Gemini).
projects.technical_details: Built with Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, Vercel AI SDK, and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini API.

projects.title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
projects.short_description: A real-time data visualization dashboard for store owners.
projects.motivation: To help small business owners quickly grasp their daily metrics without sifting through complex spreadsheets.
achievements: Rendered large datasets natively using WebGL for high framerates.
Integrated secure authentication and role-based access control.
projects.technical_details: React, TypeScript, Redux, Chart.js, and Firebase.

projects.title: Yelp & Weather Intelligence Pipeline
projects.short_description: End-to-end data engineering pipeline correlating weather patterns with Yelp restaurant sentiment using PySpark, Snowflake, Airflow, and Tableau — processing 10M+ records.
projects.motivation: Built to discover whether weather statistically drives restaurant ratings and dining behavior at scale, using the full Yelp Academic Dataset and live weather API data.
achievements: Processed 10M+ records with distributed PySpark ETL on a multi-node cluster
Applied VADER NLP sentiment analysis to 500K+ reviews with 85%+ accuracy
Designed Snowflake star-schema data warehouse with sub-5-second query latency
Orchestrated daily incremental ETL via Apache Airflow with SLA alerting
Published interactive Tableau executive dashboard on Tableau Public
